title: Substance Use Disorder Hotlines - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Mental & Behavioral Health > Substance Use Disorder Hotlines 4 Matching Service Providers Refine Results - Select - No Filter Veteran/Military Personnel Issues Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF BEHAVIORAL HEALTH RESOURCE NETWORK OF LANE COUNTY RAPID RESOURCE & TREATMENT ACCESS HOTLINE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers a single point of access to substance use treatment, harm reduction, and recovery resources. Services are offered by a collaborative group of local providers. Partner agencies may also be able to help with additional services such as housing support, job finding assistance, peer support, mental health support, needle exchange, and STI testing. Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week (800) 422-2595 Visit Website More Details FIRESIDE PROJECT PSYCHEDELIC PEER SUPPORT LINE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers confidential peer-to-peer emotional support by phone or text for people currently experiencing or processing past psychedelic experiences. Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: 7 days per week 11am-11pm Email (623) 473-7433 Visit Website More Details LINES FOR LIFE ALCOHOL AND DRUG HELPLINE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a helpline that offers information for individuals and their family members seeking crisis intervention, treatment referral, and general chemical dependency information. 5100 SW Macadam Avenue Suite 400 Portland, OR 97239 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Email (800) 923-4357 Get Directions Visit Website More Details LINES FOR LIFE MILITARY HELPLINE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a helpline giving information about benefits, PTSD, substance use disorders, anger management issues, and counseling in regard to suicidal thoughts. 5100 SW Macadam Avenue Suite 400 Portland, OR 97239 Eligibility: Individuals who are active duty military, veterans, and their families Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Email (888) 457-4838 Get Directions Visit Website More Details OREGON HEALTH AUTHORITY PUBLIC HEALTH DIVISION OREGON HOPELINE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Operates a hotline that shares information on substance use disorders, Measure 110, and peer support. Connects callers to community resources for harm reduction, treatment, and recovery. 800 NE Oregon Street Portland, OR 97232 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Email (833) 975-0505 Get Directions Visit Website More Details LINES FOR LIFE ALCOHOL AND DRUG HELPLINE OREGON HEALTH AUTHORITY PUBLIC HEALTH DIVISION OREGON HOPELINE
